title: Getting Started with Web Development
excerpt: A beginner's guide to building your first website using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. This comprehensive tutorial will walk you through the fundamentals of web development. You'll learn how to structure your pages with HTML, style them with CSS, and add interactivity with JavaScript. By the end, you'll have your first functional website deployed.

title: Design Principles for Developers
excerpt: Understanding fundamental design principles can make your projects stand out. Learn about color theory, typography, spacing, and visual hierarchy. Good design isn't just about making things look pretty—it's about creating intuitive experiences that guide users naturally through your content.

title: Building a Personal Portfolio
excerpt: Why every developer needs a portfolio and how to create one that gets noticed. Your portfolio is often the first impression potential employers or clients will have of your work. Showcase your best projects, explain your process, and demonstrate the skills that make you unique. A strong portfolio can open doors to new opportunities.
